repo_prior_art.cite: No other active qid contains this exact two-category confounding calculation.

published_prior_art.cite: ZengBalakrishnanHanKennedy2024 uses the same standard observational ATE identification setting; this is a valid diagnostic witness, not a new published result.

repo_prior_art.cite: No in-catalogue Stat proposal gives a light-cell factorial-moment polynomial bound for the overlap-restricted four-cell ATE functional.

published_prior_art.cite: JiaoVenkatHanWeissman2015 supplies the general sparse/smooth architecture and HanJiaoWeissman2020 treats discrete divergences, but neither proves this uniform bound for the coupled causal four-cell functional.

repo_prior_art.cite: No active qid studies unrestricted discrete-confounder ATE risk or this n log n alphabet frontier.

published_prior_art.cite: ZengBalakrishnanHanKennedy2024 proves the lower scale n^{-1}+d^2/(n^2 log^2 n) while its analyzed standard estimators retain n^{-1}+d^2/n^2; the proposed matching computable upper bound is not subsumed.

repo_prior_art.cite: No active qid contains an overlap-adaptive selector for this discrete ATE hybrid.

published_prior_art.cite: Adaptation by split-sample aggregation is standard, but no verified cited paper establishes it for the fixed-overlap causal cone-polynomial frontier.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Specify the heavy-cell threshold, polynomial degree, and coefficient norm as explicit functions of n and epsilon, then state the resulting computational complexity of the calibrated estimator.
Add a comparison table explaining why the JiaoVenkatHanWeissman2015 and HanJiaoWeissman2020 general functional-estimation machinery does not directly yield the overlap-cone result.
After the fixed-epsilon frontier is resolved, formulate the epsilon_n-to-zero phase diagram or an adaptation lower bound to give the project a second substantive regime boundary.

recommended_next_step: Advance to Stage 0 on the fixed-overlap matched-minimax upper-bound question; retain the direct comparison with ZengBalakrishnanHanKennedy2024 as the novelty anchor.
